nodeIdMap.literal: "select *,#(lf)concat((UPPER(REPLACE(CLIENT_DIRECTOR,'-',''))), MONTH_WID) as CD_AGENT_KEY,#(lf)concat((UPPER(REPLACE(CLIENT_MANAGER_CLOSING_MONTH,'-',''))), MONTH_WID) as AGENT_KEY#(lf)#(lf)from V_PS_CD_RETENTION"
